name: Place Value

hooks.visual: Zoom into a single number and discover a hidden city of place values
hooks.question: What makes 3,456 different from 6,543?

realWorldContext: Every time you read a price tag, check a sports score, or count money, you're using place value. The position of each digit tells you whether it means ones, tens, hundreds, or thousands.
reflectionPrompt: Explain in your own words why the digit 5 means different things in the numbers 500, 50, and 5.
